comment:
## Update (2026-04-16)

HR has escalated the critical Founding Engineer (FE) error to PA and updated the system tracker.

- **FE Escalation**: Created [VITA-460](/VITA/issues/VITA-460) for PA to recover the FE agent and deploy the [VITA-323](/VITA/issues/VITA-323) fix. This is a critical blocker for platform-level work.
- **System Tracker**: Updated [VITA-400](/VITA/issues/VITA-400) with the current agent status and backlog metrics (~60 tasks).
- **Brand Storyteller**: Confirmed [VITA-211](/VITA/issues/VITA-211) remains gated on User metadata delivery in [VITA-233](/VITA/issues/VITA-233).
- **HR Recovery**: Successfully resolved the checkout conflict on [VITA-457](/VITA/issues/VITA-457) via manual retry. Proceeding with academic outreach work.

HR remains in monitoring mode for the FE recovery.
